languages.text: {n}Едва последний член свиты ступает на борт, судно едва заметно вздрагивает. Оно отрывается от своего постамента почти неощутимо, плавно устремляясь вверх. {/n}
{n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Едва последний член свиты ступает на борт, судно едва заметно вздрагивает. Оно отрывается от своего постамента почти неощутимо, плавно устремляясь вверх. {/n}

{n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dès que le dernier membre de votre entourage monte à bord, le vaisseau se met à frémir. Il se sépare presque imperceptiblement de son piédestal et commence à s'élever doucement.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dès que le dernier membre de votre entourage monte à bord, le vaisseau se met à frémir. Il se sépare presque imperceptiblement de son piédestal et commence à s'élever doucement.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cuando el último miembro de tu séquito sube a bordo, la nave se sacude ligeramente, se separa del pedestal de un modo casi imperceptible y empieza a ascender en el aire.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Cuando el último miembro de tu séquito sube a bordo, la nave se sacude ligeramente, se separa del pedestal de un modo casi imperceptible y empieza a ascender en el aire.{/n}

languages.text: {n}当随行队伍的最后一人登上飞行器，船身传来轻微的颤动。它以几乎让人难以察觉的动静脱离了基座，开始缓缓向上漂浮。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}当随行队伍的最后一人登上飞行器，船身传来轻微的颤动。它以几乎让人难以察觉的动静脱离了基座，开始缓缓向上漂浮。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als das letzte Mitglied des Gefolges an Bord geht, erzittert das Schiff leicht. Es trennt sich kaum wahrnehmbar von seiner Halterung und gleitet sanft nach oben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als das letzte Mitglied des Gefolges an Bord geht, erzittert das Schiff leicht. Es trennt sich kaum wahrnehmbar von seiner Halterung und gleitet sanft nach oben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Maiyetin son mensubu da güverteye adımını attığında gemi hafifçe titriyor. Neredeyse hissedilmeyecek bir şekilde kaidesinden ayrılıyor ve nazikçe yukarı doğru süzülüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Maiyetin son mensubu da güverteye adımını attığında gemi hafifçe titriyor. Neredeyse hissedilmeyecek bir şekilde kaidesinden ayrılıyor ve nazikçe yukarı doğru süzülüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}随行員の最後のメンバーが船に乗り込んだ時、船はわずかに揺れた。その船は、ほとんど気づかないほど、その台から離れ、ゆっくりと上へと浮かんでいく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}
